title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss the following ways of protecting wildlife and natural habitats, then decide which two would have the greatest positive impact.
options: Expanding protected nature reserves and national parks
Introducing stricter laws against poaching and illegal wildlife trade
Engaging local communities in conservation efforts
Reducing human consumption and demand for products that harm wildlife

script.text: Now decide which two would have the greatest positive impact.

Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to conservation and human impact on nature. Discuss the following ways of protecting wildlife and natural habitats, then decide which two would have the greatest positive impact. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
